title: Oh Trailers
description: A modpack that recreates the Minecraft trailers' experience
body:
# Oh Trailers ![Affiliate](https://i.imgur.com/1O8Piaf.png)\ **Minecraft trailers: we adore them**! They showcase a breathtaking world filled with adventure and wonder. But let’s be honest—once you jump into the game, it doesn’t always feel the same. That’s where this modpack comes in, crafted to transform your gameplay and bring the magic of those trailers right to your screen! **✨ What Awaits You**: - Fast & Beautiful World Generation: Say goodbye to dull landscapes! Thanks to the incredible power of mods like Tectonic, Geophilic and Terralith, explore stunning, diverse environments that mirror the beauty of the trailers—now at lightning speed! - Less Lag, More Fun: Enjoy seamless gameplay with reduced memory usage and stuttering. Focus on your adventure without the interruptions! - Countless New Structures: Uncover a treasure trove of new structures scattered throughout the world, each perfectly integrated into the environment. Your journey will never feel dull again! - Quality of Life Features: I’ve packed in a ton of QOL improvements, enhancing your overall gaming experience, from smoother mechanics to villager names, you've got it all. - Visuals: From shaders to new player and mob animations, from waterfalls to eating animations, the world is now more animated than ever! - Experience the Magic of the Trailers: Almost everything you loved in the trailers can now be found in this modpack! Enjoy better animations, textures that pop, and a vibrant world brimming with life and adventure. **NB**: This modpack requires a pretty good GPU/CPU to run, due to having high-quality shader settings and Distant Horizons
Screenshots ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yR2Wcq7J/images/096551b0f3722df1d3c639645f01f1c8518075d0.png) ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yR2Wcq7J/images/5396533f0310c042033680eb7a772ae2490725c9.png) ![Screenshot 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yR2Wcq7J/images/90b4279afb6bbbccc07dfdeddb1e107cbfca3835.png) ![Screenshot 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yR2Wcq7J/images/9ead48f8249b3ede957a918e40db303be43f05a9.png)
